source_document: NIST AI Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0)
passage_text: GOVERN 1.1: Legal and regulatory requirements involving AI are understood, managed, and documented. Suggested Actions: Maintain awareness of all applicable AI-related legal and regulatory requirements. Document compliance efforts related to AI legal and regulatory requirements. Organizations should track proposed AI-related legislation across relevant jurisdictions.

obligation.subject: Organizations
obligation.action: maintain awareness of and document compliance with applicable AI-related legal and regulatory requirements
